summary: Comprehensive testing of Daily Horoscope App after Razorpay migration. Backend: 95.6% pass rate (22/23 tests). Frontend: 100% working. Razorpay payment integration verified working. All core features functional including horoscope generation, birth chart, kundali milan, theme toggle, and user authentication.

minor.issue: Returns 500/520 instead of 400 for invalid report type
minor.impact: Error handling could be improved, but happy path works

backend: Zodiac signs API returns all 12 signs with metadata
Daily horoscope generation with GPT-5.2 AI
Weekly horoscope generation with GPT-5.2 AI
Monthly horoscope generation with GPT-5.2 AI
Kundali Milan compatibility report generation with AI
RAZORPAY: Payment order creation for birth_chart (₹799)
RAZORPAY: Payment order creation for kundali_milan (₹1199)
RAZORPAY: Payment order creation for premium_monthly (₹1599)
Premium access check endpoint returns false for unpaid user
Get current user with session cookie
frontend: Home page renders with all 5 feature cards
Daily Horoscope card navigation working
Weekly Horoscope card navigation working
Monthly Horoscope card navigation working
Birth Chart Analysis card navigation working
Kundali Milan card navigation working
Zodiac sign selection displays all 12 signs
Zodiac sign click generates horoscope content
Birth Chart form accepts birth details
Birth Chart generation shows loading state
Kundali Milan form shows both person fields
Theme toggle switches between light/dark modes
User account menu displays correctly
User menu shows current plan (Free)
User menu shows feature availability list
User menu shows Upgrade to Premium option
User menu shows Log out option
User registration flow works
Login page renders correctly
Navigation between pages works

action_items: MINOR: Improve error handling for invalid report_type in /api/payment/create-order (return 400 instead of 500)
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session via mongosh for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay integration is working. All core features tested and functional. Minor error handling improvement suggested for payment endpoint. Theme toggle, user menu, horoscope generation all working well. PDF download was not explicitly tested in UI but backend endpoint exists.
